We could talk about it again.
Remember?
About what?
Sorry?
Let me check my notes so I can tell you more.
And I'll just tell you more later.
Hey there.
Hi.
Hello.
How are you guys?
I'm good.
Good.
How are you?
Good.
I can't remember if we were all on a call together a couple weeks ago or not.
But if we were not, my name is Sara.
work with Stephanie at Unstructured.
So she started looping me into these calls so I can start.

getting involved and help her track things awesome nice to meet you yeah i'm the managing editor uh Jürgen um i'm basically just making sure all the content goes well yeah great yeah i'm the um i'm the director of the portfolio project okay great hey hey Stef hey hi Stef we have some new faces here i'll just finish the the thought um hey Stefanie hey Sarah i'm the director on the portfolio of clients that this one falls under uh where we have a couple managing editors including Jürgen here who leads this project then of course we also have a another uh person maybe you've heard uh a content manager on this and we actually recently got a reinforcement which we're super happy super happy with uh so i'm here to support uh Jürgen and Mikhail are in the execution together with Mac um but yeah feel free to come to me as well
The questions you might have now or later, mainly I'm here to listen today, learn your project really well, and make sure Jürgen has all the resources he needs.
Okay, great.
Sorry.
So, Howard, do you two do the same thing, or how do you work together?
Sorry, make sure I'm clear.
Jürgen is more in the execution and has fewer projects to think about, so we can go deeper on each.
I'm more of the escalation point, the strategy advisor.
Okay, cool.
We have five pods like this in the company, and each of them is like its own agency, pretty much.
Cool.
Then we use the shared developer resources, the shared workflows, tools, and everything.
Okay, cool.
Awesome.
Nice to meet you.
I was like, Jürgen, don't leave me.
No, no.
I'm still here.
Awesome.
Well, I just want to join, but let's get started.
Cool.
I'll share the...
You can find it in the Slack channel as well if you want to follow along.
Yeah, so we don't have too much to cover today.
We're mostly waiting on Tarun to go over that calibration article for us.
Stefanie, I think you already went through it.
No, I thought the tone was great.
I was really happy with it.
I thought the tone was lovely.
was like, this is great.
Very informative, but still had, you know, some personality.
And it's really just about making sure that Tarun, I mean, it's so technical.
So it's just like, I can't speak to that, but I'll have Tarun review it.
And then I just am excited to get jamming on, you know, start moving a little faster at scale, which is on us for sure.
And get going, but I was really pleased.
Okay, I'm glad to hear.
yeah, as soon as Tarun gives his notes, we can start doing about five posts a week, depending on their depth.
Just to hit that 50,000 words a month goal.
So just this one step and then we can get going.
Okay, cool.
I just have one question.
Since you guys are restructuring or rebuilding your website, is publishing on the table already?
Or should we wait until you guys are finished?
We have to wait.
So we're probably going to launch anywhere from end of July to mid-August.
So we will just, and the reason why we're changing that timeline is because we're doing some major product overhauls and improvements.
And I want the website to launch to coincide with those product improvements.
So it feels like a visual cue that these are different.
But that's okay.
In the meantime, Sara, once the articles are done, we just can link to them.
We can take them, publish them.
And do that once a week.
We'll post all the articles on a Friday or whenever they're done.
Awesome.
You'll find in the Airtable as well that we link to each post we've done at the end in a cell.
So it's all in one place if you just refer to that.
Okay.
And for the next step after this calibration, Turin, we mentioned going over the Airtable in general and making sure that we're targeting the right topics.
I think he already said it looks pretty good that it would be helpful just to approve the next batch so we know what we can focus on for the rest of the month.
Okay, I will make sure that he reviews articles.
So he hasn't approved anything from like when we talked?
No, I don't think so.
Okay, I will have him do that today.
Yeah, you'll see as well that I...
Wait, accidentally stopped sharing.
I updated the Airtable so that it's more clear.
primer see.
Where the grouping should be, like when you go through approval, it should be starting and considering.
This is where you guys can go in and approve or reject topics.
So you can go here to this dropdown, and if it's ready to go, it should be approved topics, and then anything that we're busy with will be in its own section called Articles in Progress.
And have you guys looked to see and gone into our Google Analytics to see what people are searching and how they find us?
Yes, we have a while back.
Basically, anyone who looks for unstructured is looking, you know, googling unstructured specifically.
I know.
That was big.
I feel like there were some other keywords.
It was much smaller that people were searching.
That's all.
That's okay.
I need to go through this with Charoon as well.
Okay.
And make sure that we're hitting some of that just enterprise data for Gen.ai, transforming data, how to parse a PDF, how to parse, you know, that kind of stuff.
want to make sure we've got content that supports all that.
Yeah, so you guys literally just posted a YouTube video about how to parse a PDF.
Yeah, that's a big one.
Those are really good points to embed in our blog posts as well.
Oh, yeah.
Now, is that something that you guys would do or would that be something we would need to do?
Depending on how your CMS is structured, I believe we can just embed from straight onto the page.
Yeah, oh, for sure.
But I just mean, I didn't know if, like, you guys would be connected enough to the content we've made to grab it.

If guys can share whenever, well, I can always just follow your socials and find out that way, but it would be helpful if you, when you publish new socials, we can just go through them and see where we can add them to relevant posts and support.
We are changing, we're just in this weird phase, Jürgen, where it's like, product isn't working between us super well, we're fixing it.
And that's why we pulled down the ability to have direct access to unstructured.
And during this phase, it's really hard to be a dev rel and write a bunch of content about how great unstructured is if it's broken a little bit.
So what we're doing instead is, so we're kind of pulling back on original content and doing a lot of like repurposing some old content.
So we can share our content calendar in the future with you, especially once we get back to humming again.
But right now, if you feel like that's a little slow, it is intentionally.
We're kind of pulling back, focusing on developing a better product, and then we'll launch with a lot more energy in the fall.
Awesome.
We'll try to keep up with the pace.
I'm sure you will.
Branko, did you have anything to add?
Sorry.
I was just going to comment on

I'm clicking around right now.
Okay, cool.
Cool.
Well, I'll get on Tarun.
That sounds great.
I'll get on Tarun to go through that and ask him to have that updated by end of day.
Amazing.
Awesome.
All right.

Nice to meet you, Branko.
Yeah, nice to meet you, Steve.

Talk soon.

Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and progress between Unstructured and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Calibration article pending Tarun's review; once approved, content production can scale to \~5 posts/week (50k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Unstructured website relaunch planned for end of July to mid-August, coinciding with major product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Content strategy adjusting due to temporary product issues; focus on repurposing old content until fall relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Branko (GrowthX): Director of portfolio, supports Jürgen & team, escalation point, strategy advisor](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Jürgen (GrowthX): Managing editor, leads project execution](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Sara (Unstructured): New to calls, working with Stefanie](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Stefanie (Unstructured): Primary point of contact for Unstructured](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Content Progress and Next Steps

  - [Calibration article awaiting Tarun's technical review](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Airtable updated for clearer topic grouping and approval process](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Goal: 5 posts/week, 50,000 words/month once calibration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Stefanie to ensure Tarun reviews articles and approves next batch of topics by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Website and Publishing Strategy

  - [Unstructured website relaunch: end of July to mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Current strategy: Link to completed articles, publish in batches (e.g., weekly on Fridays)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Post-launch: Regular publishing on new website](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Content Focus and SEO

  - [Need to align content with key search terms: "enterprise data for Gen.AI", "transforming data", "how to parse a PDF"](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX to embed relevant YouTube content (e.g., recent "how to parse a PDF" video) in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Unstructured temporarily reducing original content production due to product issues](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Branko to investigate additional keywords (potentially including "ETL") using SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Communication and Collaboration

  - [Unstructured to share content calendar in the future, especially post-product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow Unstructured's social media for content ideas and embedding opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tarun to review calibration article and approve next batch of topics (by end of day)](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Stefanie to ensure Tarun completes reviews promptly](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin scaling content production once calibration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Branko to provide keyword insights from SEMrush analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Teams to maintain communication on content calendar and social media updates](https://fathom.video/share/Tyxkjd589xm-ndqAbfxy4XgDhXazF8CS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

action_items.description: Have Tarun review calibration article + approve next batch of topics in Airtable by EOD
Review Airtable w/ Tarun; ensure topics cover key areas (enterprise data for Gen.ai, transforming data, parsing PDFs)
Analyze SEMrush data for relevant keywords; report findings to team
